title: Work safely
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Work safely demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify and follow workplace safety requirements

pcs.text: Identify and follow workplace health and safety duty of care requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow workplace health and safety duty of care requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow workplace health and safety duty of care requirements.

pcs.text: Identify and explain own responsibilities to comply with workplace health and safety practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and explain own responsibilities to comply with workplace health and safety practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and explain own responsibilities to comply with workplace health and safety practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify and follow workplace safety requirements

elements.title: Observe safe work practices

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
